name: read
full_help:
Topic                 Description
read_bd               This command is auto loaded by Tcl. To explicitly load the command type 'load_features ipintegrator'.
read_checkpoint       Read a design checkpoint
read_csv              Import package pin and port placement information
read_edif             Read one or more EDIF or NGC files
read_hw               This command is auto loaded by Tcl. To explicitly load the command type 'load_features labtools'.
read_hw_core          This command is auto loaded by Tcl. To explicitly load the command type 'load_features labtools'.
read_hw_ila_data      This command is auto loaded by Tcl. To explicitly load the command type 'load_features labtools'.
read_hw_probes        This command is auto loaded by Tcl. To explicitly load the command type 'load_features labtools'.
read_hw_sio_scan      This command is auto loaded by Tcl. To explicitly load the command type 'load_features labtools'.
read_hw_sio_sweep     This command is auto loaded by Tcl. To explicitly load the command type 'load_features labtools'.
read_ip               Read one or more IP files
read_iphys_opt_tcl    load iPhysOpt script and run it.
read_mem              Read one or more data files (.mem .mif .dat).
read_noc_solution     Read NOC solution from JSON file
read_qor_suggestions  Read QoR Suggestions from the given file
read_saif             Import simulation data in saif format
read_schematic        Import schematic 
read_twx              Read timing results from Trace STA tool
read_verilog          Read one or more Verilog files
read_vhdl             Read one or more VHDL files
read_xdc              read physical and timing constraints from one of more files.
readback_hw_cfgmem    This command is auto loaded by Tcl. To explicitly load the command type 'load_features labtools'.
readback_hw_device    This command is auto loaded by Tcl. To explicitly load the command type 'load_features labtools'.

For help on an individual topic, type 'help <topic>'. For example:
% help create_project
